deep_dive.title: ThAME: 3D Memory-Enabled Heterogeneous Accelerator for LLM Mixture of Experts
deep_dive.abstract: Mixture of Experts (MoE) architectures have emerged as a dominant paradigm for scaling Large Language Models (LLMs). However, MoE inference on conventional hardware is constrained by three fundamental bottlenecks. These encompass the massive memory bandwidth required to fetch non-contiguous expert weights, the non-deterministic scatter-gather traffic generated by input-dependent token routing, and the tail-latency dependency imposed by synchronous expert output aggregation. To address these challenges, we propose ThAME, a three-dimensional (3D) heterogeneous multi-chiplet architecture for MoE inference. ThAME employs Ferroelectric Field-Effect Transistor (FeFET)-based non-volatile and DRAM-based volatile memory chiplets with a co-designed compute mapping strategy that aligns the distinct computational profiles of attention mechanisms and expert routing. Furthermore, we design a specialized Network-on-Chip communication backbone optimized to mitigate the bottlenecks associated with non-deterministic token routing traffic across the combinatorial space of input-dependent MoE traffic patterns. Experimental results demonstrate that ThAME outperforms state-of-the-art counterparts by up to 15.7x in terms of speedup and improves energy efficiency by up to 9.8x.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: 3D heterogeneous multi-chiplet architecture, FeFET non-volatile memory
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 三维异构多芯粒架构，FeFET非易失性存储
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 三维异构多芯粒架构，FeFET非易失性存储
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 三维异构多芯粒架构，FeFET非易失性存储
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: ThAME proposes a 3D heterogeneous multi-chiplet architecture using FeFET and DRAM chiplets to accelerate LLM MoE inference by addressing memory bandwidth, scatter-gather traffic, and tail-latency bottlenecks.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对传统硬件加速LLM专家混合（MoE）推理面临的显存带宽、非确定性散射聚集流量和尾延迟依赖三大瓶颈，提出了ThAME，一种基于三维（3D）异构多芯粒架构，结合FeFET非易失性存储和DRAM易失性存储芯粒，通过协同设计计算和存储层次，有效缓解了这些瓶颈，显著提升了MoE推理效率。实验表明ThAME在延迟和能效上具有明显优势。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文针对传统硬件加速LLM专家混合（MoE）推理面临的显存带宽、非确定性散射聚集流量和尾延迟依赖三大瓶颈，提出了ThAME，一种基于三维（3D）异构多芯粒架构，结合FeFET非易失性存储和DRAM易失性存储芯粒，通过协同设计计算和存储层次，有效缓解了这些瓶颈，显著提升了MoE推理效率。实验表明ThAME在延迟和能效上具有明显优势。
